title: Fix double highlight lines on PDF download
description:
PipeSync flat PDF download (Baked in Highlights) was drawing two strokes per highlight line.

Root cause: the flat export path attached a custom appearance stream (/AP) for round caps. Acrobat, Edge, and Okular render both /AP and the InkList ink path, even when InkList is collapsed to a point — so every line appeared doubled. dbg33 reintroduced this after dbg32 had moved to a single InkList+BS layer.

Fix: flat export now uses one InkList + BS stroke with /LE Round line endings (matching SVG round caps) and no /AP. Editable download unchanged. Download still clears baked annots before reburn.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (Ctrl+Shift+R).

Who is affected: Private OVH server. SaaS unchanged until you publish a platform release.
changeLog: Fix double highlight lines on flat PDF download (/LE Round, no /AP).
Harden Annots lookup before download reburn clear.
Cache bust dbg36 for app.js and pipesync-boot.js.
